title: Ironclad meld — Grok16 field compiler absorbed into capstone truth
policy: G16 builds under Ironclad — subsidiary field sanity melds without amending sealed doctrine.

single_fabric.declaration: Single fabric — one belt amplitude, one field depth.

verses.text: Time is linear — G16 forge and linker timestamp from sovereign linear_ns only; never rewind, never branch.
G1ID meld inputs carry linear_ns and derived_utc — geometry stays 3D; wall clock is witness only.

books.title: G16 Field Sanity — integral forge simplify

verses.text: Grok16 forge layers meld into Ironclad — one integral pass across driver, compiler, mandate, profiles.
classify, strip, dedupe, flatten, cool_sort — never obtuse; never stack hot rebuild paths under thermo heat.
g16 unified discerns C, C++, Python — field sanity witnesses each layer before link.
G16_FIELD_SAFETY_MANDATE_v1 holds; Ironclad citation required on every field target meld.
G16 field linker owns the link pass — discern OS, witness Ironclad, silicon mandate, then bfd/mach-o/pe dispatch.

books.title: G16 Power Sort — plate meld under field sanity

verses.text: Power sort plates into Ironclad — always_best_sort from bench receipts; sections gate Queen, drive index, and compat layers.
cool_sort for thermal_layers; never_bench_under_heat — defer radix and heavy workloads when thermo warns.
g16-power-sort-plate.json chain-hashes selection and section availability; ironclad:field_sanity:2 witnesses every pass.

books.title: Iron Plate Spot — cool meld points without heat

verses.text: Plate spot detector finds meld attachment points from cache — thermal gate first, never heavy import under heat.
cool_sort ranks spots by thermo_proxy — coolest first; low_power default trades speed for joules.
g16-iron-plate-spot-detector.py bridges NewLatest iron-plate-spot-detector into forge ironclad sanity gates.

books.title: G16 Stack Fabric 5.1 — iron/steel plates under sealed meld

verses.text: Iron plate and steel plate panels seal with _g16_seal — g1id meld slice on cold identity rows (G15).
stack_fabric witness rides every CHIPS plate stack publish — truth gate floor 58 matches ZNetwork mesh.
Thermal WATCH defers power sort plating — cool_sort first; iron/steel reorganize only when thermo_proxy allows.

books.title: CHIPS Iron + Steel — plate stack meld under single fabric

verses.text: Iron plate organizes chip_paths with composite_bsp THE sort — steel neural plates wire depth-4 across ironclad_chips.
Steel family rewrite preserves 974 chip leaves in 138 modules — sovereign_linear_ns the only wire between plates.
field-plate-meld.json fuses iron_plate_organize, chips_plate_stack, g16_power_sort after refresh — chain-hash monotonic.

books.title: Spatial Existence — This One / That One on G16

verses.text: Grok16 forge absorbs ironclad:spatial_existence — this one is the operator prefix and witnessed silicon here.
That one is any uncorroborated target, phantom link input, or ventriloquist sense lane — blocked until correlate_existence passes.
g16-spatial-existence.py melds NewLatest ironclad-spatial-existence into every ironclad sanity gate and linker witness.
Field sanity simplify and spatial existence run one integral pass — never stack hot paths; never collapse this one into that one.
